# Led Matrix Fade
ResolutionHardwareWeek1

I'm building this project beacause I wanted to understand the fundametals of resistors and capacitors, and how changing their values affects the LED light/output.
The switch controls power to LEDs with different resistor values, seeing how long they last when the switch is turned off


Switch the switch on/off and watch the effect!
